items.name: Ben
items.text:
Middle age adult Male.
Light skin tone.
Medium brown full head of hair.
Long, between shoulder length hair pulled into a low ponytail.
Blue almond shaped eyes.
Thin nose.
Long reddish brown tapered beard.
Realistic, mature features.
Average height.
Dad bod build.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Pickle Boy
items.text:
Anthropomorphic gherkin.
Green bumpy skin.
Skinny.
Big Blue eyes
Smiling.

Stick arm and legs
The finger classic Disney glove hands

Playful demeanor
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: BJ
items.text:
BJ.
Adult woman.
Olive skin tone.
Long straight purple hair.
Grey blue eyes.
Dark eyeliner.
Full lips
Mature, realistic facial structure.
High Cheekbones.
Thin nose.
Elegant feminine physique.
6 feet tall.
Expressive face.
Small breast.
Tattoos.
Small stud piercings, one in each nostril.
Single small silver stud piercing centered between lower lip and chin.
Navel Piercing
Ears piercing all around edges.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Toriyama, Akira
items.text:
Akira Toriyama-inspired clean animation illustration.
Highly readable character design.
Smooth inked linework.
Soft cel shading.
Simple but expressive facial features.
Clear anatomical structure.
Bright, clean color palette.
Balanced cartoon realism.
Strong silhouette readability.
Lightweight animation aesthetic.
Dragon Ball era illustration style.
No heavy texture or painterly shading.
items.author: Unknown

items.name: Parkinson, Keith
items.text:
Keith Parkinson-inspired fantasy illustration.
Classic Dungeons and Dragons artwork.
Heroic fantasy adventure.
Bright fantasy color palette.
Epic quest atmosphere.
Legendary heroes.
Dragons and ancient ruins.
Detailed fantasy costumes.
High fantasy worldbuilding.
Fantasy novel cover illustration.
Traditional oil painting.
Richly detailed environment.
Optimistic heroic tone.
Classic TSR-era fantasy art.
Adventure and exploration.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Lee, Jim
items.text:
Jim Lee-inspired modern superhero illustration.
Highly detailed inked linework.
Dynamic anatomy with exaggerated but realistic proportions.
Strong muscle structure and defined form rendering.
Cross-hatched shading with controlled rendering detail.
Crisp contour lines and precise inking.
Dramatic superhero composition.
High-energy action illustration style.
Clean but highly complex visual detailing.
Modern DC Comics aesthetic.
Sharp edges and polished line discipline.
No painterly texture.
No soft rendering.
items.author: Unknown

items.name: Volumetric God Rays
items.text:
Visible light rays passing through atmospheric particles.
Soft directional beams of light.
God rays filtering through environment.
Subtle haze and depth-based light scattering.
Cinematic atmospheric lighting effect.
Light shafts interacting with environment geometry.
Controlled bloom without overexposure.
Fantasy and sci-fi environmental illumination.
Depth-enhancing atmospheric perspective lighting.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Aliens watching
items.text:
Short grey aliens standing in background.
Large grey eyes.
Exaggerate head shapes
small mouth.
no nose.
Four long skinny fingers on each hand
items.author: BTP_Art
